metrics.description: Percentage of transactions resulting in customer disputes; target: ≤2% within 6 months of go-live
Hours from end-of-day close to fully reconciled ledger; target: ≤4 hours
Percentage of retail transactions settled on the same business day; target: ≥95%
Reduction in manual reconciliation cost; target: £2.4M by end of Year 1
Net Promoter Score for payment experience; target: +15 points from baseline within 12 months
Ratio of correctly blocked fraudulent transactions to all blocked; target: ≥92% precision to minimize false positives
